title: AN ACT TO AMEND SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS "THE PUBLIC WORKS APPROPRIATION ACT OF 1956."

chunks.text:
H. No. 4744 / 52 OG No. 9, 4208 (August 16, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1530, June 16, 1956 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS "THE PUBLIC WORKS APPROPRIATION ACT OF 1956."

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section three of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven, particularly item "as Samar," Roman Numeral II, is hereby amended so as to include the following appropriations:

"49. Minarog Barrio School Building, Motiongâ

Construction and improvement

P4,000.00

"50. Mualbual Barrio School Building, Zumarragaâ

Repair, improvement and reconstruction

4,000.00

"51. Malakining Barrio School Building, Talaloraâ

Repair, improvement and reconstruction

4,000.00

"52. Loquilocon Barrio School Building, Wrightâ

Construction and improvement

4,000.00

"53. Paco Barrio School Building, Wrightâ

Construction and improvement

4,000.00

"54. Lamingao Barrio School Building, San Sebastianâ

Construction and improvement

3,400.00

"55. Dolores Barrio School Building, San Sebastianâ

Construction and improvement

3,400.00

"56. Maylobe Barrio School Building, Motiongâ

Construction and improvement

4,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1956.
